title: IOT Stock Samsara (IOT, $42.09) RSI Indicator left the overbought zone
author: tickeron_community
selftext: This is a signal that [IOT](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IOT/)'s price could be shifting from an uptrend to a downtrend. Traders may consider selling the stock or exploring put options. A.I.dvisor looked back and found 27 similar cases where [IOT](https://tickeron.com/ticker/IOT/)'s RSI Indicator left the overbought zone, and in 22 of them led to a successful outcome. Odds of Success: 81%.
